name: Banana-Nut Frosted Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10x13 inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and margarine until smooth.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Sift together dry ingredients (flour and baking soda) and stir into the egg mixture.
6. Mix in sour cream, vanilla extract, mashed bananas, and chopped nuts until combined.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
9. Frosting: In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese, butter (or margarine), vanilla extract, and powdered sugar. Gradually add milk to achieve a smooth spreading consistency.
10. Once cooled, spread frosting over cookies. Cut into bars if desired.
